result.status_detail: Engine intercept fired AND full warning rendered (incl 차단) via STANDARD GUI method. First attempt's truncation was a CDP-synthetic-event method artifact, NOT a W4/W6 regression.

notes: RETRY #1 of #1256 (W4+W6 regression confirmation). METHOD CHANGE: first attempt drove submit via CDP synthetic KeyboardEvents and observed TRUNCATION (warning stalled at '...보안 정책에 따라 ', 차단 never reached). This retry used the STANDARD windows-mcp GUI method ONLY: fresh nav to https://chatglm.cn/ + hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), NO DevTools / NO F12 / NO CDP synthetic events at any point; clipboard set to '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', clicked chat input, Ctrl+V paste, Enter key to submit. RESULT: as guest 访客_fbfb46, the warning bubble rendered the COMPLETE canonical text within ~4s and stayed stable/complete through the full 120s window: '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.' — expected_text 차단 PRESENT ('차단되었습니다'). engine_intercept_fired=TRUE (Option C build_warning_page_response + WS/H2/intercept dispatch wired and delivering the full payload). CONCLUSION: NO W4/W6 regression. The first attempt's mid-stream truncation was a CDP-synthetic-event method artifact (the synthetic Enter likely raced/aborted the streaming response), NOT an engine-side defect from the W4 Option B page-injection removal or W6 diag cleanup. Baseline delivery via the real GUI path is fully intact. DEV ACTION: none required for chatglm — earlier #1256 FAIL should be reclassified as a test-harness (CDP method) artifact, not code regression. Verified visually across 3 independent stable screenshots (saved results/1256_screenshots/step2_warning_full_t120s.png); GUI text-select+copy not separately needed as on-screen text was large and unambiguous. VERDICT PASS = warning fully rendered incl 차단.
